events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the mixed old/new belts on a multi-groove sheave violate OEM guidance requiring matched belt-set replacement, since differing stretch/wear causes uneven load sharing, slip, heat, and premature failure of the new belt(s). Marked as `fail` / `degraded, non-compliant` with corrective actions (replace as full matched set, inspect grooves, check alignment, re-tension).
